ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "second_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defender, Goalkeeper) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., fit, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team name */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Score at half-time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tactics" (
  "tactic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tactic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "tactic_description" TEXT /* Description of the tactic used in the match */,
  "tactic_type" TEXT /* Type of tactic (e.g., defensive, attacking) */,
  "tactic_formation" TEXT /* Formation used in the match (e.g., 4-3-3, 4-4-2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tactic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defender, Goalkeeper)
Date of birth of the player
